checkpoint.summary: PHASE_004 complete. All three units landed: unit_016 (parallel Layer 1 + Layer 2 sub-section in commands/invoke.md Step 9), unit_017 (mirror in workspace-commands template section 10), unit_018 (per-layer wall-clock timing in evidence format across both docs). Phase is pure docs; 109/109 tests unchanged across the phase. The two invoke docs now (a) tell the agent how to fan Layer 1 + Layer 2 out as concurrent Bash calls when the config flag is on, (b) keep Layers 3/4 serial with justification, (c) preserve flag-off behavior from v1, and (d) require per-layer timings in success evidence so the max(l1, l2) wall-clock benefit is visible in checkpoint history.
